Every time I play night one, the monkey pops up by the window, but then I go hide under the table, but then it jump, scares me. Also, every single time you die, you have to leave the game and rejoin. They should just have a button that says go to lobby because then you don’t have to leave and rejoin because that’s a pain in the ￼butt. Also, you should add multiplayer. It would be a lot funner with multiplayer just me by myself is not really that fun.

reviews.review_title: I have an idea for 5 or an extra night
reviews.review_description: So my idea is what if the office takes place in the mountain igloo and the cosmetics bar is replaced with four items in there are four monkeys trying to get to the office and you have to use the certain object to get away a certain monkey. Where the computer is will just be where your monitor is and sometimes the door will malfunction and that’s when the items will come in handy. ￼ I’m not saying you have to do this but it’s just a suggestion. I put a lot of hard thinking into this. I’m excited to see this game at it’s 100%! ￼

I can’t get in public it says no connection that’s stupid

developer_response.body: Here is the announcement we made a bit ago that explains your issue: Hey everyone! FNAM reached 100K players, but... the default free PlayFab plan has a limit of 100K players, meaning new players won’t be able to buy stuff or connect to lobbies until I've figured out a solution! The standard plan for unlimited players is $100 a month, and I currently don’t have that kind of money! If you want to help, then go support me on Patreon (Patreon name is Gameboy_Alex) Have a great day!

This is hands down, one of the best Vr games I've ever played! Aside from when you spawn in night 1, sometimes it is all black, but I just restarted my game! I haven't beaten it yet because I didn't have much battery, but I am making a series for YouTube. I DO NOT think that I'm gonna get 750 views and 75 likes. SupeVr is my YouTube channel, by the way. But I am curious about the borded up hole in the wall where the night selection room is. Overall, it's a GREAT game! I would give this 10 stars if I could.
